programme.title: Lennon Remembered: A Reporter's Journal
programme.desc: Tom Brook marks the fortieth anniversary of former Beatle John Lennon's murder in New York on 8 December 1980. His untimely death was a slaying that shocked millions of fans around the world. In Lennon Remembered: A Reporter's Journal, the BBC's Tom Brook, the first British journalist to report live from the site of the New York shooting, takes stock of Lennon's life and the legacy of his music. Brook recounts what happened on the night Lennon died when he returned to his home, the Dakota apartment building on Manhattan's Upper West Side, with his wife Yoko Ono, and he hears from some of Lennon's closest confidantes as well as younger Lennon fans in America today. Drawing on a wealth of archive material, the programme includes Tom Brook's interview with the former Beatle's widow Yoko Ono, one of the first she gave, in which she discussed Lennon's life and death. The programme assesses John Lennon's powerful legacy 40 years on and asks whether his messages of love and peace are still re

programme.title: Trusadh (Compelling Stories)
programme.desc: Over 30 years on, the scale and magnitude of the Piper Alpha disaster continues to shock. Iona Ballantyne's father Bob was a well-known spokesman for survivors and their families, and a delayed response to grief was felt strongly by Iona years after his death. To understand and process her own thoughts and loss she visits other families, who like her, were direct witnesses to the consequences of the disaster and the changes it forced upon them

programme.desc: Twenty-five years since the Aberdeen Gaelic School opened, many in the city are against the language. Through the eyes of the Gaels who live there this film looks at the history of Gaelic in the area and why it is different from the other major cities in Scotland. Narrated by Patricia Macleod

programme.desc: Tom, Twigs and Bertie find an abandoned boat, then make themselves a treasure map so they can set out on an adventure as brave pirates

programme.title: Stòiridh
programme.desc: Robert Robertson reads Cuirm-coille, written and illustrated by Jo Empson and translated into Gaelic by Donald John Macleod

programme.title: Saoghal Bodach na Nollaig
programme.desc: Paco decorates the ice in time for Christmas

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda
programme.desc: Mantis is called back to his home town and Shifu insists that Po accompany him on his journey. However, Mantis does not want any company - as he's told everyone in his village that he is the Dragon Warrior

programme.title: Geamaichean Gorach
programme.desc: Coinneach Clogaid creates a trap for the other competitors today but, fortunately, Crùbag is able to sweep Coinneach out of the way

programme.title: Saidheans Sporsail (Backyard Science)
programme.desc: Fun science experiments that can be tried at home, including how to grow germs and make 'lick and sniff' stickers. Presented by Kerry Anne MacLeod and Allan MacDonald

programme.title: Turas a' Bhradain (The Salmon's Journey)
programme.desc: Neen MacKay explores Scotland's fishing rivers, following the salmon's migration routes

programme.title: Speaking Our Language
programme.desc: An opportunity to learn Gaelic. Presented by Rhoda MacDonald

programme.title: Earrann Eachdraidh (History Shorts)
programme.desc: A look at some extreme uses of body parts

programme.title: An Là (News)
programme.desc: Local, national and international news and information from BBC ALBA

programme.title: Leugh Mi (Book Show)
programme.desc: Rosemary Ward and Ben Ò Ceallaigh join presenter Anna Macleod to discuss books of special interest to them. The range of books includes the language of politics and geopolitics, humorous stories and youth fiction. Gaelic writers also feature prominently within the selection

programme.title: Seòid a' Chidsin - The Kitchen Coves
programme.desc: A festive reunion takes a strange turn, with the appearance of an unexpected visitor bearing a Christmas cooking challenge and dire warnings if they fail to deliver

programme.title: Orain Oir
programme.desc: Delving into the Gaelic music archive to pick out the best performances through the decades

programme.title: An Lan - A' Tuigsinn an Lain/Tide - Understanding the Tide
programme.desc: The people who depend on the tide for their living, those whose lifestyle revolves around its ebb and flow, as well as those for whom changes to tidal patterns threaten their whole way of life. A thrilling annual beach horse race is held on a date dictated by the tides on Omey, an Irish tidal island

programme.title: Julie Fowlis: Ceol Aig Baile
programme.desc: Featuring multiple Grammy-winning music star Rosanne Cash, Dreamer's Circus from Denmark, May Erlewine from Michigan and virtuoso jazz pianist Kit Downes

programme.title: Alba Today
programme.desc: BBC Alba joins Radio nan Gàidheal, the BBC's Gaelic language radio service

programme.title: Good Morning Britain
programme.desc: Morning magazine featuring a lively mix of news and current affairs, plus health, entertainment and lifestyle features

programme.title: Lorraine
programme.desc: Entertainment, current affairs and fashion news, as well as showbiz stories and celebrity gossip. Presented by Lorraine Kelly

programme.title: This Morning
programme.desc: A mix of celebrity chat, lifestyle features, advice and competitions

programme.title: Loose Women
programme.desc: Celebrity interviews and studio discussion from a female perspective

programme.title: Dickinson's Real Deal
programme.desc: David Dickinson and the team are in Wolverhampton, where a 300-year-old book turns up on Simon Schneider's table and Henry Nicholls has his eye on a diamond ring

programme.title: Winning Combination
programme.desc: Omid Djalili hosts the quiz, with contestants Romy, Carla, Emily, Francesca, Neil, Jonathan, Calum, Chris and Sally each assigned a number between one and nine, with the four that make the final trying to win the jackpot defined by those numbers. Each player's number is also the total of questions they must answer correctly in the final game against the clock

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Ben Shephard hosts the quiz in which contestants answer questions to win turns on an arcade-style machine. Dropping tokens down a choice of four chutes, they hope to knock piles of them off a moving shelf - and the more they collect, the greater the prize fund. The player who has won the least amount is then eliminated, and the last one standing competes for a £10,000 jackpot

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh presents as Chris, Lucy, Paddy and Karen pit their wits against one of the ruthless Chasers in the hope of winning a potential prize pot worth thousands of pounds. They work as a team and play strategically to answer general knowledge questions against the clock and race down the game board to the exit without being caught

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Rishi has an accident, Meena has a plan, and Paul is uneasy

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Yasmeen's fate hangs in the balance as the trial draws to a close, the residents band together to halt Ray's bulldozer, and Daniel uncovers the truth about Adam and Carla

programme.title: Coronation Street: 60 Unforgettable Years
programme.desc: Joanna Lumley narrates a celebration of the diamond anniversary of the programme, exploring the legacy of the world's longest-running TV soap opera. There are revelations from the show's stars past and present, including audition nerves, fallings out, memorable location shoots, as well as their memories of the storylines that gripped the nation

programme.title: ITV News at Ten
programme.desc: A fresh perspective on the major stories of the day, featuring national and international news, with reports and analysis from ITV's correspondents

programme.title: It'll Be Alright on the Night
programme.desc: David Walliams presents a compilation of TV clangers from the past year's programmes. Featuring live on-air blunders from Stormzy, Robbie Williams, Craig Revel Horwood, Jonathan Ross, and Ant & Dec, as well as a series of outtakes starring Will.i.am and Jeremy Clarkson. Plus, two toddlers run rings around Kay Burley, and Vicky Pattison forgets the name of the show she's presenting

programme.title: All Elite Wrestling: Dynamite
programme.desc: Hard-hitting action from the world of All Elite Wrestling, featuring all of the biggest stars on the roster, including Adam Page, Chris Jericho, Cody and Jon Moxley

programme.title: Back to Mine
programme.desc: Hotel concierge Nigel is house hunting for love with the help of his best friend Rufus. The singleton is looking to find someone special and give them the five-star treatment. To do so, Nigel visits three London-based women's homes and is faced with a tricky choice when it comes to picking one to take on a date. There is a gin-loving interior stylist, an Ibiza party girl and a former ballet dancer. Who will be heading back to his?

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Aaron overhears Paddy's plan, Manpreet is baffled, and Dawn is in danger

programme.title: For the Love of Britain
programme.desc: Julie Walters, Julia Bradbury, Ade Edmondson, Ben Fogle and Ray Mears explore the wonders of the Lake District, Britain's most popular national park. Julia hikes up Helvellyn, England's third highest peak, Ben has an unusual climbing experience at Honister slate mine, Ray encounters Britain's biggest ants, and Adrian captains a vintage steamer on the waters of lake Ullswater

programme.title: The Royal Variety Performance
programme.desc: The annual extravaganza to raise money for the Royal Variety Charity features performances from Sheridan Smith, reprising her role as Cilla Black, and Samantha Barks in an exclusive preview of the forthcoming Frozen stage musical. The show also features music from Michael Ball, Gary Barlow, Steps, Melanie C and Britain's Got Talent winner Jon Courtenay. Other acts on the bill include Marisha Wallace, Celeste, Daliso Chaponda, Jo Caulfield, Stephen Mulhern and the Black Blues Brothers, plus an appearance by Captain Sir Thomas Moore

programme.title: ITV News at Ten
programme.desc: A fresh perspective on the major stories of the day, featuring national and international news, with reports and analysis from ITV's correspondents

programme.title: Great Art
programme.desc: Tim Marlow explores the extreme positive and negative reactions to Renoir's changing style, examining some of the 181 paintings held at the Barnes Foundation in Philadelphia. The film reveals how his new direction was an influence on Picasso and Matisse, making it a vital turning point in the development of art between the 19th and 20th centuries

programme.title: Monster Carp
programme.desc: The team film their first-ever episode in the UK, from the Wasing Estate in Berkshire, which has a number of lakes and was previously the home of the British record carp. Ali, Neil and Tom find it difficult to tempt the carp as this lake has been fished regularly by other anglers, and these old fish have seen everything over the years

programme.title: Dickinson's Real Deal
programme.desc: David and his dealers set up shop in Milton Keynes, where Stewart Hofgartner ends up over paying once again. Meanwhile, Mark Steven and David Ford fight over a tin-plate toy car, and Tracy Thackray-Howitt gets a table full of Cartier trinkets

programme.title: Winning Combination
programme.desc: Quiz, hosted by Omid Djalili, in which contestants Jess, Harry, Martin, Punita, Andy, Kate, Helen, Terry and Lee are assigned a number between one and nine. They are then whittled down to a final four, and the combination of numbers they are assigned represents the size of the jackpot they play to win in a final round

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Ben Shephard hosts the quiz in which contestants answer questions to win turns on an arcade-style machine. Dropping tokens down a choice of four chutes, they hope to knock piles of them off a moving shelf - and the more they collect, the greater the prize fund. The player who has won the least amount is then eliminated, and the last one standing competes for a £10,000 jackpot

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh presents as contestants Victoria, Mel, Emma and Gerry pit their wits against one of the ruthless Chasers in the hope of winning a potential prize pot worth thousands of pounds. They work as a team and play strategically to answer general knowledge questions against the clock and race down the game board to the exit without being caught

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Harriet has some alarming news, Marlon has a good idea for Paddy, and Billy is annoyed with Dawn

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: On the 60th anniversary of Coronation Street's debut on ITV, the trial verdict leads to a dramatic showdown between Geoff and Alya. Meanwhile, Ken and Abi lead the charge against Ray's demolition, and Carla and Daniel inadvertently fuel Peter's paranoia

programme.title: Paul O'Grady's Great British Escape
programme.desc: In a new six-part series, Paul O'Grady shares the beautiful sights, stories and secrets of his beloved adopted home county, Kent. In a year where many people have chosen to holiday closer to home due to the Covid-19 pandemic, Paul embraces the opportunity to rediscover what the county has to offer. This time, Paul explores Kent's beautiful forests and woodlands, visiting the Wildwood Trust outside Canterbury, a wildlife conservation centre protecting some of Britain's endangered animals. Later, he Paul to Kentish Pip, a 100-year old cider apple orchard, before heading deep into the weald of Kent to learn the ancient skill of horse coppicing

programme.title: Queens of the Street
programme.desc: A special programme celebrating the women who have starred in Coronation Street over the years, marking 60 years since the very first episode aired in December 1960. The programme features contributions from an array of the show's leading ladies - past and present - including Julie Hesmondhalgh, Sally Lindsay, Helen Worth, Alison King, Sue Nicholls, Sally Dynevor, Kate Ford, Dolly-Rose Campbell and Patti Clare, along with writers, producers and celebrity fans.

programme.title: You've Been Framed!

programme.title: Supermarket Sweep

programme.title: You've Been Framed!
programme.desc: Harry Hill makes the holiday season merry with another selection of comical clips with a festive theme, submitted for his viewing pleasure by fans at home. programme.title: You've Been Framed!
programme.desc: Harry Hill narrates a comical selection of mishaps filmed by viewers, featuring everything from giddy grandmas, cute kids and crazy animals to below-the-belt mishaps, practical jokers and painful-looking accidents

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: Walden meets an attractive British woman at the supermarket, and the encounter prompts him to consider getting back into the dating game. However, his efforts leave his would-be conquest convinced he is not yet ready for another romance. Guest starring Sophie Winkleman (Peep Show)

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: Walden seems to have moved on following his divorce, and is busy trying his best to impress a new love interest, only for Bridget to make another reappearance. Starring Jon Cryer, Ashton Kutcher, Angus T Jones and Judy Greer

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: The final four cook for club goers who have taken over Hell's Kitchen. Dinner service gives each of the chefs a chance to run the pass, but Gordon is out to sabotage them

programme.title: The Emily Atack Show
programme.desc: In the final episode, Emily turns her attention to growing up, looking back at her years as a teenager and sharing their thoughts on being in her 30s

programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: The guys volunteer to chaperone the high school prom, where Quagmire hits it off with Courtney - only to discover she is in fact his daughter

programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: The Griffins provide DVD commentary on a recent episode and reveal never-before-told drama between Peter and Lois

programme.title: American Dad!
programme.desc: Roger becomes a marionette and injures other students to help Steve win the school talent show. Stan, Hayley and Klaus start their own local honey business

programme.title: American Dad!
programme.desc: While having trouble communicating, Stan and Hayley team up to stop a terrorist plot to blow up the Bazooka Sharks' arena. Roger pretends to be an escort

programme.title: Shopping with Keith Lemon
programme.desc: Italian chef and presenter Gino D'Acampo teaches Keith how to make pizza and pasta at one of his restaurants, and Keith takes rapper Lady Leshurr to an adventure farm park

programme.title: The Cleveland Show
programme.desc: Rallo joins the Freedom Squirts, and spots an opportunity to make money by selling sweets. Meanwhile, Donna and Cleveland win a romantic weekend break, but have to work off their bill when they accidentally charge too many expenses to their room

programme.title: The Cleveland Show
programme.desc: Donna gets into an argument with Arianna at a silent auction, so Cleveland defends his wife's honour by throwing eggs at her adversary's house. He decides to do the same to all the people who have offended his family, but problems arise when he is accused of a murder he did not commit. Guest starring Arianna Huffington

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: Walden, still pretending to be regular guy Sam in Kate's company, lands a job selling Christmas trees in a festive edition of the comedy. Meanwhile, Mark Zuckerberg takes an interest in Walden's business, and Berta lifts Alan's spirits

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: Jake visits for the weekend, triggering the start of a whole heap of trouble involving tattooed mothers, inappropriate daughters and a used-car salesman. He cheats on his girlfriend with her 18-year-old daughter - and Alan and Walden become involved in the ugly repercussions

programme.title: The Stand Up Sketch Show
programme.desc: Routines by comedians including Nigel Ng, Helen Bauer, Lily Phillips and Seann Walsh are reconstructed as sketches

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Buying goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Vera hopes Terry will settle down now he has a family. Jack is upset to hear that Don is in a psychiatric hospital. Ray tells Tricia she is making a mistake if she stays with Terry

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Terry finds Tricia's affection suffocating. Kevin confides in Chris that Natalie keeps making a play for him. Mavis worries that Wilf wants a relationship with her

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Chris tells Kim that Kelly has moved into the nursery flat. Zoe tries to smooth things over with the Windsors. Roy wants to make a big thing about Jan's homecoming

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Paddy thinks Biff should be told that he is really the father of Kelly's baby. Jed Outhwaite causes trouble in the hospital again, and Sarah argues with Rachel

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Harold Beecham angrily accuses his neighbour Roger Parslow when his dog dies from poisoning, and his refusal to co-operate with the police lands him in prison, where a tragedy occurs that puts PC Younger's career on the line. Meanwhile, Carol confronts a herbalist who was treating Harold, and the people of Aidensfield are intent on impressing a visiting radio journalist. Richard Todd and Ralf Little guest

programme.title: Bless This House
programme.desc: Sid wants a lie-in, but it is doomed from the beginning as Sally chases romance and Jean goes on a diet. Vintage comedy, starring Sid James

programme.title: Bless This House
programme.desc: Sid resolves to exercise a little discipline when Sally adopts a stray dog. Comedy, starring Sid James

programme.title: Outside Edge
programme.desc: Roger's pre-match strategy has a dramatic impact in the team's hotel room on the night before the Cromer game. Comedy drama, starring Brenda Blethyn, Robert Daws, Timothy Spall and Josie Lawrence

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: With Louisa visiting her mother in Spain to get some perspective on their marriage, Martin knows he needs to try to change for the sake of their relationship, so he endeavours to keep his promise to her to see a therapist. Aunt Ruth arranges an appointment for him with Dr Rachel Timoney, but a lifeboat training exercise causes problems for the doctor. Will he get back in time for his first session? Martin Clunes stars

programme.title: The Durrells
programme.desc: Louisa opens a new boarding house, but the arrival of a mysterious new guest places the villa under police scrutiny. Gerry remains as devoted as ever to the island's wildlife, and announces his plans to open his own zoo. Margo is struggling to find clients for her beauty treatments, and resorts to desperate measures to find people to practice her skills on. The final series of the drama based on Gerald Durrell's books, starring Keeley Hawes

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Suspicion falls on Gina's new cellar man Len Carter when a valuable pendant is stolen from Emily Forster, a guest at the Aidensfield Arms. A search into the barman's past reveals a history of crime, but Emily appears more disturbed by the presence of pub comedian Tommy Tanner. Meanwhile, Peggy secures a good deal on a new vehicle and Geoff's need for speed gets the better of him

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Marlon teases Will about being found in a compromising position with Dee. Sam is pleased when Kathy offers to restart his reading lessons. Sarah and Jack have a heart-to-heart

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Mandy is at the end of her tether with Paddy's snoring. Chris finds Kelly packing to leave. Marlon convinces Eric to let him run the wine bar for one evening a fortnight

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Vera pleads with Jack not to tell anyone that Terry tried to steal the takings. Martin is shocked to hear Don is going to be charged with attempted murder

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Ashley visits Don in prison, and Brennan implicates him in the factory fire. Vera breaks down over Terry. Alma tells Mike she wants them to make a fresh start abroad

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: Oswald Cooper is the prime suspect in the rape of a teenage girl, but presents an alibi supported by three pillars of the community. When Cooper is murdered, Lewis discovers a web of deceit going back 20 years, in which the dead man was used by the trio to cover up a sordid series of secrets - but the case soon takes on a personal dimension for the inspector. Kwame Kwei-Armah, Sean McGinley, Richard McCabe and Daniela Nardini guest star, with Kevin Whately

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The sleuth finds himself in interesting company as English socialites and American millionaires rub shoulders on board a train bound for the French Riviera. Passengers include oil magnate Rufus Van Aldin (Elliott Gould) and his daughter Ruth (Jaime Murray) - to whom he has given a magnificent ruby known as the Heart of Fire. With members of the aristocracy crammed into a confined space with their husbands, lovers and a renowned gemstone, murder cannot be far away. With Lindsay Duncan, Roger Lloyd Pack and James D'Arcy

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The detective's friend Sir Charles Cartwright (guest star Martin Shaw) hosts a cocktail party at his home in Cornwall, where an amiable local priest chokes to death on his drink. There seems to be no motive for murder, and no trace of poison found in the victim's glass, but weeks later, when Sir Charles's doctor friend Sir Bartholomew Strange dies in similar circumstances, he and Poirot team up to investigate. Drama, with Art Malik, Jane Asher and Anna Carteret, and David Suchet in the title role

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Florrie Lindley takes over the corner shop and Ken Barlow clashes with his father Frank. The first episode shown on December 9, 1960

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Val decides to give people something to talk about, and Betty is made senior barmaid at the Rovers in this episode from December 9, 1970

programme.title: The Trouble with Maggie Cole
programme.desc: Six-part drama following the lives of residents in the close-knit coastal resort of Thurlbury. Local historian Maggie Cole is flattered when she is interviewed for a radio show about village life, but she inadvertently shares too much detail about the locals and their private lives. Starring Dawn French and Julie Hesmondhalgh

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: A serial killer begins targeting members of a religious group that claims to provide guidance for lost souls. As the investigation proceeds, it becomes clear that Hathaway, who once trained for the priesthood, knows more about the case than he is willing to reveal - causing Lewis to consider him as a suspect. Guest starring Ian McNeice and Rachael Stirling alongside Kevin Whately and Laurence Fox

programme.title: Bless This House
programme.desc: Sid suffers temporary amnesia, but Jean is on hand to produce reminders of his antics at the annual Boy Scouts reunion. Comedy, starring Sid James

programme.title: Bless This House
programme.desc: Mike attempts to earn some cash without Sid's interference. Seventies comedy, starring Sid James

programme.title: Outside Edge
programme.desc: The day of the Cromer game dawns and the team are determined to beat Fatty Woollacott's side at all costs - but a mysterious incident in Dorking threatens to put a spanner in the works. Comedy drama, with Brenda Blethyn, Robert Daws, Timothy Spall and Josie Lawrence

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Al welcomes his first fishing guests, but an uninvited one means that a good review is definitely not guaranteed, while Bert decides to try to rejuvenate trade at the restaurant by joining an online voucher scheme. Morwenna asks Martin for a pay rise, and Louisa has to find a new babysitter to look after James Henry and reluctantly decides to offer Janice a trial. Penhale is excited to receive his new police issue Taser, but Portwenn does not exactly offer him plenty of opportunities to try it out. Comedy drama, starring Martin Clunes

programme.title: The Durrells
programme.desc: An encounter with Daphne leaves Leslie pondering the possibility of fatherhood. He offers to look after her baby for a day, only to find himself having to organise a hunting expedition for one of the guests. With an unfortunate shortage of wildlife to hand, he persuades basil to pretend to be a wild boar. Gerry is opposed to killing animals for sport, so he and Galini hatch a plan to sabotage the hunt. Margo moves in with Theo, and Louisa is on the receiving end of some slightly confused romantic advances

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Lord Ashfordly's tenants are angered when his new estate manager Jimbo Brady employs the hard-line methods learned in South Africa and raises their rents. Brian Rogers faces eviction, but suspicion is more widespread when Jimbo's vehicle is sabotaged. Meanwhile, Peggy believes she has found the explanation for David's recent behaviour

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Viv and Vic are invited to a dinner party at Home Farm by Chris. Sam and Butch attempt to gatecrash Mandy's underwear party. Will kisses Dee and asks her to leave Eric

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Alma looks into emigrating to Florida. Ashley tells Fred about the keys and how Don wants him to ditch them. Rita is stunned to hear that Alec has been claiming Joyce's salary

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Ashley fears he will be sent to prison. Kevin is annoyed when Natalie does not answer his phone calls. Tricia decides to give Ray a chance

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: A barmaid's murder leads Lewis (Kevin Whately) and Hathaway (Laurence Fox) to a respected professor, who admits he once had an affair with the woman. However, they discover the killing was copied straight from the pages of a popular fantasy novel written by an Oxford tutor, suggesting it may be the work of a crazed fan - or something even more sinister. Guest starring Art Malik, Tom Mison and James Fox, father of Laurence

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The dapper Belgian sleuth goes on an Egyptian cruise on board an old steamer, but when an American heiress is murdered, his little grey cells go into overdrive. On questioning each of his fellow passengers, he realises many of them have secrets they want to remain hidden. David Suchet stars, with James Fox, Judy Parfitt, Emily Blunt, Daisy Donovan, Frances de la Tour and David Soul

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Joyce Barnaby swerves off the road into a ditch, convinced she has hit someone, but nobody is found injured and Tom thinks she has imagined it. However, when a local historian discovers the body of a librarian in a nearby cemetery, Joyce blames herself for the man's death, leading her husband into a spooky investigation to find the real killer on the loose in the haunted village of March Magna. Guest starring Danny Webb (The Bill), with John Nettles, Jason Hughes and Jane Wymark

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Emily does not understand why Arnold told her Margaret was dead, and Flora is horrified that he could be a bigamist. Episode first shown on December 8, 1980

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Arnold tries to explain himself to Emily, Bert is made redundant from the foundry, and Stan discovers he is allergic to eggs and not beer. Episode first shown on December 10, 1980

programme.title: The Trouble with Maggie Cole
programme.desc: Maggie wants to apologise to everyone she has upset, and decides to go and visit GP Carol Tomlin. The radio interview has gone viral and the village is left reeling from the revelations. Jill bonds with other fellow members of the 'outed six', Marcus and Roxanna. Meanwhile, Neil and Kelly embrace what was broadcast and pretend that they are lottery winners, and later, Maggie discovers the truth about Dr Carol's marriage. Starring Dawn French, Mark Heap, Chetna Pandya, Vicki Pepperdine and Emily Reid

programme.title: A Touch of Frost
programme.desc: Another chance to see the feature-length first episode of the popular detective drama. Inspector Jack Frost's investigation into the case of a missing child uncovers a skeleton chained to a locked strongbox that tantalisingly turns out to be empty, but provides evidence of a crime committed 30 years previously. David Jason stars as the irascible detective, with Bruce Alexander, Matt Bardock and Claire Hackett

programme.title: Bless This House
programme.desc: The family return from holiday, and it seems as if they never went away. Seventies comedy, starring Sid James

programme.title: Bless This House
programme.desc: The age gap between Sid and his children becomes apparent when he returns home early from work. Comedy, starring Sid James

programme.title: Outside Edge
programme.desc: As Brent Park looks ahead to a new season, Roger tries to make amends with Miriam before whipping the team into shape. Cricketing comedy drama, starring Brenda Blethyn

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: The irascible medic decides to move out of the surgery to give Louisa space, leaving Mrs Tishell concerned he will not be able to look after himself on his own. Elsewhere, PC Penhale helps Janice babysit, and Al is very concerned when he finds out about Bert's behaviour and hears there are bailiffs at the restaurant

programme.title: The Durrells
programme.desc: Louisa meets Spiros' wife for the first time, and invites her to join the family on a trip to visit Larry in Kalami. However, the journey ends badly when their picnic is eaten by hungry animals, and Larry turns out to have left the island for Paris. As tensions rise, they seek the help of a local bar owner, who has a special gift for Gerry. Meanwhile, Margo brings a touch of the continent to Prue and Geoffrey's Dorset home

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Gina and Phil make the final preparations for their big day, but the groom's uneventful stag night stirs up some pre-wedding nerves. Rob and Peggy prepare a surprise for the soon-to-be-wed couple, and the village grows concerned when an elderly resident mysteriously disappears. Tricia Penrose, Mark Jordon, Jonathan Kerrigan and Gwen Taylor star

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: The wine bar is a mess after Marlon's first night in charge. Becky confides in Zoe that Tony never shows her any affection. Sam enjoys reading Wuthering Heights

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: The atmosphere is strained between Zoe and Becky. Paddy is shocked when he hears a gunshot at Outhwaite's house. Kathy regrets teaching Sam to read and write

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Mike pays Frances to clear Ashley's name. Roy decides to change the name of the cafe to Roy's Rolls. Samantha grows tired of having Sean around all the time

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Fiona is proud of Alan's promotion. Sean tries to apologise to Samantha. Ashley is shocked when the police arrest him on suspicion of arson

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: A student production of The Merchant of Venice is halted when the actor playing Shylock is murdered during the performance. Lewis and Hathaway are struck by the lack of grief among the cast and crew - especially the ambitious director, who wastes no time recasting the role. The detectives discover the victim had an expensive lifestyle and not only owed money to his fellow students, but was also suspected of stealing from them. However, the investigation has barely got under way before the killer strikes again. Kevin Whately and Laurence Fox star

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: Millionaire Gordon Cloade's wife is widowed for the second time at the tender age of 23, arousing the suspicions of his impoverished relatives. Fanning the flames of envy and hatred, psychic aunt Kathy Cloade reveals the grieving widow's first husband is in fact still alive, and a second death prompts Poirot to delve deeper into the family's dark secrets. David Suchet stars, with Jenny Agutter, Tim Piggot-Smith and Celia Imrie

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: An aristocrat's wealthy, overbearing wife finances a North African archaeological dig to find the skull of John the Baptist. Poirot is in attendance, but when the woman is found stabbed to death, and only her husband, the exuberant Lord Boynton, appears distraught, the detective struggles to identify the killer among the wealth of suspects. Guest starring Tim Curry, Cheryl Campbell, John Hannah, Emma Cunniffe, Mark Gatiss, Angela Pleasence and Beth Goddard, with David Suchet in the title role

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Des spends the night on the Websters' sofa, to teach Steph a lesson. Mike worries about what Ivy will say to the workers, and Jackie tells him she is not going to share him. First shown on December 10, 1990

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Mike and Jackie row about how to run Ingram's, Des tells Steph he wants children, and Don tells Ivy he is scared that Marie will turn to prostitution. First shown on December 12, 1990

programme.title: The Trouble with Maggie Cole
programme.desc: Peter Cole is worried about the press interest following Maggie's interview and the online petition calling for his resignation over the scandal. Meanwhile, Alex is greeted at work by two money lenders, who have found him because his girlfriend Roxanna's picture appeared in the papers. Author Marcus Ormansby gives a talk at the school, and finds that romance is blossoming between him and Jill. Later, Maggie's visit to Kelly's salon is tense, but they have a heart to heart, leading Kelly to return home to husband Neil and take action over their 'lottery' money

programme.title: A Touch of Frost
programme.desc: Feature-length episode of the crime drama. DI Frost has his hands full coping with death threats, arson and a staff shortage at the station - but anything is better than staying at home with an unwelcome guest. David Jason stars as the grouchy inspector, with Tony Haygarth, Diane Bull, Denise Black and Dominic Jephcott

programme.desc: Mandy is at the end of her tether with Paddy's snoring. Chris finds Kelly packing to leave. Marlon convinces Eric to let him run the wine bar for one evening a fortnight

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Vera pleads with Jack not to tell anyone that Terry tried to steal the takings. Martin is shocked to hear Don is going to be charged with attempted murder

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Ashley visits Don in prison, and Brennan implicates him in the factory fire. Vera breaks down over Terry. Alma tells Mike she wants them to make a fresh start abroad

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: Oswald Cooper is the prime suspect in the rape of a teenage girl, but presents an alibi supported by three pillars of the community. When Cooper is murdered, Lewis discovers a web of deceit going back 20 years, in which the dead man was used by the trio to cover up a sordid series of secrets - but the case soon takes on a personal dimension for the inspector. Kwame Kwei-Armah, Sean McGinley, Richard McCabe and Daniela Nardini guest star, with Kevin Whately

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The sleuth finds himself in interesting company as English socialites and American millionaires rub shoulders on board a train bound for the French Riviera. Passengers include oil magnate Rufus Van Aldin (Elliott Gould) and his daughter Ruth (Jaime Murray) - to whom he has given a magnificent ruby known as the Heart of Fire. With members of the aristocracy crammed into a confined space with their husbands, lovers and a renowned gemstone, murder cannot be far away. With Lindsay Duncan, Roger Lloyd Pack and James D'Arcy

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The detective's friend Sir Charles Cartwright (guest star Martin Shaw) hosts a cocktail party at his home in Cornwall, where an amiable local priest chokes to death on his drink. There seems to be no motive for murder, and no trace of poison found in the victim's glass, but weeks later, when Sir Charles's doctor friend Sir Bartholomew Strange dies in similar circumstances, he and Poirot team up to investigate. Drama, with Art Malik, Jane Asher and Anna Carteret, and David Suchet in the title role

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Florrie Lindley takes over the corner shop and Ken Barlow clashes with his father Frank. The first episode shown on December 9, 1960

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Val decides to give people something to talk about, and Betty is made senior barmaid at the Rovers in this episode from December 9, 1970

programme.title: The Trouble with Maggie Cole
programme.desc: Six-part drama following the lives of residents in the close-knit coastal resort of Thurlbury. Local historian Maggie Cole is flattered when she is interviewed for a radio show about village life, but she inadvertently shares too much detail about the locals and their private lives. Starring Dawn French and Julie Hesmondhalgh

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: A serial killer begins targeting members of a religious group that claims to provide guidance for lost souls. As the investigation proceeds, it becomes clear that Hathaway, who once trained for the priesthood, knows more about the case than he is willing to reveal - causing Lewis to consider him as a suspect. Guest starring Ian McNeice and Rachael Stirling alongside Kevin Whately and Laurence Fox

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Mandy is at the end of her tether with Paddy's snoring. Chris finds Kelly packing to leave. Marlon convinces Eric to let him run the wine bar for one evening a fortnight

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Suspicion falls on Gina's new cellar man Len Carter when a valuable pendant is stolen from Emily Forster, a guest at the Aidensfield Arms. A search into the barman's past reveals a history of crime, but Emily appears more disturbed by the presence of pub comedian Tommy Tanner. Meanwhile, Peggy secures a good deal on a new vehicle and Geoff's need for speed gets the better of him

programme.title: Bless This House
programme.desc: Sid suffers temporary amnesia, but Jean is on hand to produce reminders of his antics at the annual Boy Scouts reunion. Comedy, starring Sid James

programme.title: Bless This House
programme.desc: Mike attempts to earn some cash without Sid's interference. Seventies comedy, starring Sid James

programme.title: Outside Edge
programme.desc: The day of the Cromer game dawns and the team are determined to beat Fatty Woollacott's side at all costs - but a mysterious incident in Dorking threatens to put a spanner in the works. Comedy drama, with Brenda Blethyn, Robert Daws, Timothy Spall and Josie Lawrence

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Al welcomes his first fishing guests, but an uninvited one means that a good review is definitely not guaranteed, while Bert decides to try to rejuvenate trade at the restaurant by joining an online voucher scheme. Morwenna asks Martin for a pay rise, and Louisa has to find a new babysitter to look after James Henry and reluctantly decides to offer Janice a trial. Penhale is excited to receive his new police issue Taser, but Portwenn does not exactly offer him plenty of opportunities to try it out. Comedy drama, starring Martin Clunes

programme.title: The Durrells
programme.desc: An encounter with Daphne leaves Leslie pondering the possibility of fatherhood. He offers to look after her baby for a day, only to find himself having to organise a hunting expedition for one of the guests. With an unfortunate shortage of wildlife to hand, he persuades basil to pretend to be a wild boar. Gerry is opposed to killing animals for sport, so he and Galini hatch a plan to sabotage the hunt. Margo moves in with Theo, and Louisa is on the receiving end of some slightly confused romantic advances

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Lord Ashfordly's tenants are angered when his new estate manager Jimbo Brady employs the hard-line methods learned in South Africa and raises their rents. Brian Rogers faces eviction, but suspicion is more widespread when Jimbo's vehicle is sabotaged. Meanwhile, Peggy believes she has found the explanation for David's recent behaviour

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Viv and Vic are invited to a dinner party at Home Farm by Chris. Sam and Butch attempt to gatecrash Mandy's underwear party. Will kisses Dee and asks her to leave Eric

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Alma looks into emigrating to Florida. Ashley tells Fred about the keys and how Don wants him to ditch them. Rita is stunned to hear that Alec has been claiming Joyce's salary

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Ashley fears he will be sent to prison. Kevin is annoyed when Natalie does not answer his phone calls. Tricia decides to give Ray a chance

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: A barmaid's murder leads Lewis (Kevin Whately) and Hathaway (Laurence Fox) to a respected professor, who admits he once had an affair with the woman. However, they discover the killing was copied straight from the pages of a popular fantasy novel written by an Oxford tutor, suggesting it may be the work of a crazed fan - or something even more sinister. Guest starring Art Malik, Tom Mison and James Fox, father of Laurence

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The dapper Belgian sleuth goes on an Egyptian cruise on board an old steamer, but when an American heiress is murdered, his little grey cells go into overdrive. On questioning each of his fellow passengers, he realises many of them have secrets they want to remain hidden. David Suchet stars, with James Fox, Judy Parfitt, Emily Blunt, Daisy Donovan, Frances de la Tour and David Soul

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Joyce Barnaby swerves off the road into a ditch, convinced she has hit someone, but nobody is found injured and Tom thinks she has imagined it. However, when a local historian discovers the body of a librarian in a nearby cemetery, Joyce blames herself for the man's death, leading her husband into a spooky investigation to find the real killer on the loose in the haunted village of March Magna. Guest starring Danny Webb (The Bill), with John Nettles, Jason Hughes and Jane Wymark

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Emily does not understand why Arnold told her Margaret was dead, and Flora is horrified that he could be a bigamist. Episode first shown on December 8, 1980

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Arnold tries to explain himself to Emily, Bert is made redundant from the foundry, and Stan discovers he is allergic to eggs and not beer. Episode first shown on December 10, 1980

programme.title: The Trouble with Maggie Cole
programme.desc: Maggie wants to apologise to everyone she has upset, and decides to go and visit GP Carol Tomlin. The radio interview has gone viral and the village is left reeling from the revelations. Jill bonds with other fellow members of the 'outed six', Marcus and Roxanna. Meanwhile, Neil and Kelly embrace what was broadcast and pretend that they are lottery winners, and later, Maggie discovers the truth about Dr Carol's marriage. Starring Dawn French, Mark Heap, Chetna Pandya, Vicki Pepperdine and Emily Reid

programme.title: A Touch of Frost
programme.desc: Another chance to see the feature-length first episode of the popular detective drama. Inspector Jack Frost's investigation into the case of a missing child uncovers a skeleton chained to a locked strongbox that tantalisingly turns out to be empty, but provides evidence of a crime committed 30 years previously. David Jason stars as the irascible detective, with Bruce Alexander, Matt Bardock and Claire Hackett

programme.title: Bless This House
programme.desc: The family return from holiday, and it seems as if they never went away. Seventies comedy, starring Sid James

programme.title: Bless This House
programme.desc: The age gap between Sid and his children becomes apparent when he returns home early from work. Comedy, starring Sid James

programme.title: Outside Edge
programme.desc: As Brent Park looks ahead to a new season, Roger tries to make amends with Miriam before whipping the team into shape. Cricketing comedy drama, starring Brenda Blethyn

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: The irascible medic decides to move out of the surgery to give Louisa space, leaving Mrs Tishell concerned he will not be able to look after himself on his own. Elsewhere, PC Penhale helps Janice babysit, and Al is very concerned when he finds out about Bert's behaviour and hears there are bailiffs at the restaurant

programme.title: The Durrells
programme.desc: Louisa meets Spiros' wife for the first time, and invites her to join the family on a trip to visit Larry in Kalami. However, the journey ends badly when their picnic is eaten by hungry animals, and Larry turns out to have left the island for Paris. As tensions rise, they seek the help of a local bar owner, who has a special gift for Gerry. Meanwhile, Margo brings a touch of the continent to Prue and Geoffrey's Dorset home

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Gina and Phil make the final preparations for their big day, but the groom's uneventful stag night stirs up some pre-wedding nerves. Rob and Peggy prepare a surprise for the soon-to-be-wed couple, and the village grows concerned when an elderly resident mysteriously disappears. Tricia Penrose, Mark Jordon, Jonathan Kerrigan and Gwen Taylor star

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: The wine bar is a mess after Marlon's first night in charge. Becky confides in Zoe that Tony never shows her any affection. Sam enjoys reading Wuthering Heights

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: The atmosphere is strained between Zoe and Becky. Paddy is shocked when he hears a gunshot at Outhwaite's house. Kathy regrets teaching Sam to read and write

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Mike pays Frances to clear Ashley's name. Roy decides to change the name of the cafe to Roy's Rolls. Samantha grows tired of having Sean around all the time

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Fiona is proud of Alan's promotion. Sean tries to apologise to Samantha. Ashley is shocked when the police arrest him on suspicion of arson

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: A student production of The Merchant of Venice is halted when the actor playing Shylock is murdered during the performance. Lewis and Hathaway are struck by the lack of grief among the cast and crew - especially the ambitious director, who wastes no time recasting the role. The detectives discover the victim had an expensive lifestyle and not only owed money to his fellow students, but was also suspected of stealing from them. However, the investigation has barely got under way before the killer strikes again. Kevin Whately and Laurence Fox star

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: Millionaire Gordon Cloade's wife is widowed for the second time at the tender age of 23, arousing the suspicions of his impoverished relatives. Fanning the flames of envy and hatred, psychic aunt Kathy Cloade reveals the grieving widow's first husband is in fact still alive, and a second death prompts Poirot to delve deeper into the family's dark secrets. David Suchet stars, with Jenny Agutter, Tim Piggot-Smith and Celia Imrie

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: An aristocrat's wealthy, overbearing wife finances a North African archaeological dig to find the skull of John the Baptist. Poirot is in attendance, but when the woman is found stabbed to death, and only her husband, the exuberant Lord Boynton, appears distraught, the detective struggles to identify the killer among the wealth of suspects. Guest starring Tim Curry, Cheryl Campbell, John Hannah, Emma Cunniffe, Mark Gatiss, Angela Pleasence and Beth Goddard, with David Suchet in the title role

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Des spends the night on the Websters' sofa, to teach Steph a lesson. Mike worries about what Ivy will say to the workers, and Jackie tells him she is not going to share him. First shown on December 10, 1990

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Mike and Jackie row about how to run Ingram's, Des tells Steph he wants children, and Don tells Ivy he is scared that Marie will turn to prostitution. First shown on December 12, 1990

programme.title: The Trouble with Maggie Cole
programme.desc: Peter Cole is worried about the press interest following Maggie's interview and the online petition calling for his resignation over the scandal. Meanwhile, Alex is greeted at work by two money lenders, who have found him because his girlfriend Roxanna's picture appeared in the papers. Author Marcus Ormansby gives a talk at the school, and finds that romance is blossoming between him and Jill. Later, Maggie's visit to Kelly's salon is tense, but they have a heart to heart, leading Kelly to return home to husband Neil and take action over their 'lottery' money

programme.title: A Touch of Frost
programme.desc: Feature-length episode of the crime drama. DI Frost has his hands full coping with death threats, arson and a staff shortage at the station - but anything is better than staying at home with an unwelcome guest. David Jason stars as the grouchy inspector, with Tony Haygarth, Diane Bull, Denise Black and Dominic Jephcott

programme.title: ITV3 Nightscreen
programme.desc: Text-based information service

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Buying goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Only When I Laugh
programme.desc: Norman's diary logging his private thoughts is discovered by the other patients - who fail to appreciate what they read. Christopher Strauli stars

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: A temperamental film actress becomes the apparent victim of an abduction from the set of her latest movie, and Simon must find out whether her disappearance is a publicity stunt or something altogether more sinister. Roger Moore stars

programme.title: Robin of Sherwood
programme.desc: Robert's father is arrested for treason and sentenced to death. The outlaws try to rescue him, but they too are captured. Fortunately, help is at hand in the form of a reclusive old woman suspected of being a witch - and her pet pig Rutterkin

programme.title: Dempsey and Makepeace
programme.desc: The detective duo investigate a series of attacks on a giant corporation by a mysterious terrorist group, and uncover a shocking secret

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Arthur looks forward to a big payout when an ex-con needs his help to recover the loot from a robbery committed 14 years earlier - but learns banks are not always as safe as they seem. Vintage comedy drama, guest starring Rula Lenska, Maurice Denman and Max Wall

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: An Israeli minister is abducted, and the ensuing suburban siege triggers an airborne pursuit as Bodie and Doyle try to save the day. Drama, starring Martin Shaw and Lewis Collins

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: A £30,000 consignment of mercury is stolen and the squad is bemused when the prime suspect comes up with a cast-iron alibi - he was in the company of his 'mistress' hours before his planned wedding ceremony. Diana Dors guest stars in the crime drama, alongside John Thaw and Dennis Waterman

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: A diamond trail leads Templar to mannequins and murder. Classic adventure, starring Roger Moore as globe-trotting adventurer Simon Templar

programme.title: The Adventures of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: The sleuth investigates the case of a man who has acquired a well-paid but mysterious job - seemingly on account of his red hair. Period detective drama, starring Jeremy Brett and David Burke, with Eric Porter as Moriarty

programme.title: Dempsey and Makepeace
programme.desc: An international banker is held to ransom, providing Makepeace with an ideal opportunity to prove a point to her chauvinistic partner as she too gets caught up in the hostage situation. Michael Brandon and Glynis Barber star

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Crooked property tycoon Ted Standen goes back on his word following the release from prison of his former business partner Alex Rowan. The vengeful ex-associate begins orchestrating attacks on Ted and his son John, and Terry is called upon to protect the youngster. Gareth Hunt and Alfie Bass guest star, with George Cole and Dennis Waterman

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: Bodie's girlfriend is critically injured in a restaurant bomb blast, prompting him to seek revenge. When it transpires the intended target was an apparently unimportant accountant, Bodie ignores Cowley's orders and begins probing the man's past. Lewis Collins stars

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: A Scottish detective on the trail of a gang of crooks requests help, and the squad resolves to catch his quarry. However, it becomes apparent that the visiting sleuth is holding back some important information that Regan and his colleagues need to know. TV presenter Janet Ellis features in a supporting role

programme.title: Tenable
programme.desc: Quiz hosted by Warwick Davis in which five nightclub workers from Bridgwater take on the Tenable Tower and attempt to win a £125,000 jackpot. Can they score a perfect 10 and bring the money home?

programme.title: Griff's Great Australian Adventure
programme.desc: Comedian, actor and travel enthusiast Griff Rhys Jones continues his journey Down Under. On the Spirit of the Outback, travelling to Queensland's west, Griff seeks to uncover what makes 'the good life' - from the glitz and glamour of the Gold Coast to the dreams of the Australian Outback, revered by bush poets and pioneers across history

programme.title: The World Is Not Enough (1999)
programme.desc: James Bond is assigned to protect the heiress of an oil dynasty after her father is killed in a bombing at MI6 headquarters. The attack is the work of an infamous terrorist who is unable to feel pain after surviving a gunshot to his head, and who now intends to destroy the world's supply of oil. Spy adventure, starring Pierce Brosnan, Robert Carlyle, Sophie Marceau and Robbie Coltrane

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: The Saint is framed for the murder of a young sculptor, and with the help of the victim's girlfriend, Chief Inspector Teal fights to clear his name and uncover the real culprit. Adventure, starring Roger Moore

programme.title: The Adventures of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: Moriarty seeks revenge on Holmes for foiling his plan to sell the Mona Lisa, and the pair ultimately fight their final battle at the Reichenbach Falls in Switzerland. Jeremy Brett stars as the titular hero, with David Burke making his final appearance as Dr Watson and Eric Porter as Moriarty

programme.title: Dempsey and Makepeace
programme.desc: The duo learn the origin of an old feud, and investigate a protection racket run by a vicious gang boss. Drama, starring Michael Brandon and Glynis Barber

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Arthur does a profitable deal on a fireplace and Terry has to mind a dodgy bookie, putting a damper on his blossoming romance with latest girlfriend Dolly. Vintage comedy drama, starring George Cole and Dennis Waterman

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: Bodie and Doyle begin an investigation into why a city's crime rate is steadily falling. They later find themselves victimised by local officers after being charged with a minor traffic offence. Drama, starring Martin Shaw and Lewis Collins

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Regan and Carter track down those responsible for killing a driver and injuring a policeman while making off with vehicles carrying brandy on two separate occasions. Carter's new girlfriend, rookie cop Julie Kingdom, pursues a known fence and recovers the brandy. However, when Regan wants to take the credit, he and Carter come to blows. John Thaw and Dennis Waterman star

programme.title: Tenable
programme.desc: Warwick Davis hosts the quiz, which sees a family of five from Liverpool competing to answer questions on subjects including Monty Python, English monarch and classic comics. They then try to score a perfect 10 in the final round to take home the prize money

programme.title: The Motorbike Show
programme.desc: Henry Cole takes a ride through the Cotswolds, savouring its picturesque roads. He also meets the young designers reviving Royal Enfield, tells the story of the Ducati Monster, and has his riding technique assessed

programme.title: Henry Cole's Great British Treasure Hunt
programme.desc: TV presenter Henry Cole and five teams of passionate metal detectorists have gained exclusive access to one of Britain's most important Stately homes - Sudeley Castle. Their mission - to unearth the Castle's secret history while searching for the fabled hoard of Saxon Coins. Whichever team finds the most valuable artefacts wins the day

programme.title: The Bourne Legacy (2012)
programme.desc: The leaders of a secret government agency plan to eliminate several agents as part of a cover-up when they face having their dark secrets exposed. One of the targets is able to evade his fate and go on the run - but his escape is threatened by his dependence on drugs to boost his physical and mental capabilities. Spy thriller sequel, with Jeremy Renner, Rachel Weisz and Edward Norton

Battling to cope with the intense training sessions and beset by personal problems, he makes repeated errors with just days to go before being put on show in front of a panel of experts. programme.title: Secrets of the Factories
programme.desc: In factories across the nation, manufacturers are hard at work ensuring that Brits everywhere have all the trimmings they need for a comforting classic Christmas. This documentary takes a look at how staples of the festive season actually get made, such as Christmas trees, Christmas crackers, tinsel, Christmas jumpers and Christmas puddings. Plus, a look at some food items, such as the 10,000 tonnes of sprouts grown and harvested in Lincolnshire and how enough figgy puddings are made in a single week to fill the seats of Tottenham Hotspur Stadium

programme.title: Filthy House SOS
programme.desc: Some of Britain's filthiest and most cluttered homes are tackled in the space of just three days

programme.title: Accused: Trial in the Outback
programme.desc: Conclusion of the documentary exploring the infamous 1980 trial of Lindy Chamberlain, who was falsely accused of murdering her nine-week-old baby during a family camping trip in Central Australia, after the child was attacked by a dingo. Featuring contributions from the Chamberlain family and their personal archives, the programme also features exclusive interviewees that encompass eyewitnesses, family friends, high court judges, forensic experts and lawyers, who share their thoughts on the story of a case that still resonates to this day

programme.title: Britain's Worst Crimes
programme.desc: The circumstances surrounding the murder of 23-year-old Rachel Nickell in July 1992, when she was attacked and killed in front of her two-year-old son Alex on Wimbledon Common. Colin Stagg was originally charged with the murder, but was eventually acquitted in September 1994 before the case went cold. With more advanced and refined forensic techniques available, Scotland Yard later reopened the investigation and in December 2008 Robert Napper - already serving time in prison for another killing - pleaded guilty to Nickell's manslaughter

He befriends a Mexican in jail for killing a man who attacked his sister and tries to save him from the gallows, getting caught up in the evil clan's running internal conflicts in the process. Western, starring Randolph Scott, Craig Stevens, Manuel Rojas and Barry Kelley

programme.title: Ghostbusters (2016)
programme.desc: When a series of supernatural disturbances occurs in New York City, two experts in the paranormal investigate, joined by a brilliant inventor who has created an array of ghost-hunting gadgets and a public transport worker whose knowledge of the city provides vital clues to the sinister cause of the ghostly activity. Reboot of the 1980s comedy franchise, starring Kristen Wiig, Melissa McCarthy, Kate McKinnon, Leslie Jones and Chris Hemsworth

programme.title: Jack Reacher: Never Go Back (2016)
programme.desc: The nomadic vigilante tries to save an army major who has been framed for murder and treason. Jack Reacher discovers that Turner has been targeted by a secret government conspiracy, and together they go on the run to expose the truth. Director Edward Zwick's blockbusting action thriller sequel based on Lee Child's novel, starring Tom Cruise, Cobie Smulders, Danika Yarosh and Aldis Hodge

programme.title: Lean on Pete (2017)
programme.desc: A teenager gets a summer job working for a horse trainer and befriends the fading racehorse, Lean on Pete. Equine drama, starring Charlie Plummer, Amy Seimetz and Travis Fimmel

programme.title: 45 Years (2015)
programme.desc: A woman prepares to celebrate her 45th wedding anniversary, but one week beforehand, her husband receives a letter revealing that the body of his previous partner has been found frozen in the Swiss Alps. The message exposes the cracks in their relationship. Drama, starring Charlotte Rampling, Tom Courtenay and Geraldine James

programme.title: The File on Thelma Jordon (1950)
programme.desc: An assistant district attorney falls for a woman suspected of murdering her aunt, so he covers up evidence that may incriminate her as he attempts to get her acquitted. Film noir, starring Barbara Stanwyck and Wendell Corey

programme.title: The Turning Point (1952)
programme.desc: A journalist helps a crusading district attorney who has been given the task of cracking down on a crime syndicate, but the pair's efforts are hampered by political corruption. Film noir, starring William Holden, Edmond O'Brien and Alexis Smith

programme.title: Ride Lonesome (1959)
programme.desc: A bounty hunter captures young killer Billy John, but his real motive is not the cash reward - he has an old score to settle with his prisoner's brother Frank. As the journey to bring the murderer to justice gets under way, he is counting on a showdown with Frank and accepts the help of two outlaw gunmen for added protection, aware they will try to turn Billy John in themselves for the reward and a pardon. Western, with Randolph Scott, Lee Van Cleef, James Best, James Coburn and Pernell Roberts.

programme.title: Shane (1953)
programme.desc: A mysterious gunfighter intervenes when a man and his family are threatened by a predatory cattle baron determined to force every homesteader in the valley off the land. The situation rapidly escalates into violence, while an unspoken attraction develops between the gunman and the settler's wife. Western, starring Alan Ladd, Jack Palance, Van Heflin and Jean Arthur. Based on the novel by Jack Schaefer

programme.title: Star Trek (2009)
programme.desc: The trainee crew members of the starship Enterprise embark on their maiden flight, which pits them against a Romulan commander from the future who is planning a horrific revenge on those he blames for a tragedy in his own time. Sci-fi adventure based on the original TV series, starring Chris Pine, Zachary Quinto, Eric Bana, Zoe Saldana and Leonard Nimoy

programme.title: Jason Bourne (2016)
programme.desc: Former government operative Jason Bourne has been in hiding for 12 years after exposing a sinister CIA operation. However, he once again finds himself being hunted down when a former CIA operative gone rogue acquires top secret information - including details of Bourne's own father's involvement in a clandestine scheme. Action thriller, starring Matt Damon, Tommy Lee Jones, Alicia Vikander and Julia Stiles

programme.title: Legend (2015)
programme.desc: Biopic of the Kray brothers, exploring their rise to power in the London underworld and conflicts with rival gangs from the point of view of Reggie's wife Frances, who remains devoted to her husband even as he remains equally bound to his brutal, unstable sibling. Starring Tom Hardy as both twins, with Emily Browning, Christopher Eccleston and David Thewlis

programme.title: The Midnight Man (2016)
programme.desc: A teenager and her friend are thrown into a living nightmare when a game they discover in an attic releases a terrifying creature. Horror, starring Robert Englund, Gabrielle Haugh and Lin Shaye

programme.title: Angel and the Badman (1947)
programme.desc: A gunslinger determined to track down his father's killer is badly wounded and taken in by a Quaker family, whose daughter nurses him back to health. His attraction to the girl and growing respect for the family's peaceful way of life lead him to consider renouncing violence - but his desire for revenge proves hard to surrender. Western, starring John Wayne, Bruce Cabot and Gail Russell

programme.title: The Guns of Fort Petticoat (1957)
programme.desc: A lieutenant deserts after his commanding officer launches an unprovoked attack on a Comanche village during the Civil War. Realising that there are no soldiers in his home town to protect it from reprisals, he returns to train the local women to defend themselves. Western, starring Audie Murphy, Kathryn Grant, Hope Emerson and Jeff Donnell

programme.title: Houseboat (1958)
programme.desc: An Italian socialite rebels against her domineering father and gets a job as a maid for a widowed father. While helping her employer learn to understand his three precocious children, she also falls in love with him and must decide whether or not to reveal her secret. Romantic comedy, starring Cary Grant and Sophia Loren

programme.title: Last Train from Gun Hill (1959)
programme.desc: A marshal discovers the man responsible for raping and killing his wife is actually the son of an old friend, setting the scene for a showdown. Western, starring Kirk Douglas, Anthony Quinn, Brian Hutton and Carolyn Jones

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Out of the Shadows (2016)
programme.desc: The sewer-dwelling heroes discover their arch enemy Shredder has returned from another dimension, and made a deal with an alien warlord. Assisted by two mutant henchman, Shredder goes in search of a lost device that will allow his new ally to mount an invasion of Earth. Action adventure sequel, starring Megan Fox, Will Arnett and Stephen Amell

programme.title: Den of Thieves (2018)
programme.desc: An elite unit of the Los Angeles county sheriffs' department investigates a series of perfectly executed heists, and uncovers a criminal gang composed of military veterans, whose strategic and combat experience make them an elusive foe. The investigators set out to bring them to justice before they can carry out their biggest robbery yet - stealing £120million from the Federal Reserve Bank. Director Christian Gudegast's crime drama, starring Gerard Butler and Jordan Bridges

programme.title: Mike and Dave Need Wedding Dates (2016)
programme.desc: Two hard-partying brothers place an online advertisement to find the perfect dates for their sister's Hawaiian wedding. Hoping for a wild getaway, the boys instead find themselves out-hustled by an uncontrollable duo and calamity ensues. Comedy, starring Zac Efron, Anna Kendrick and Adam Devine

programme.title: The Principles of Lust (2003)
programme.desc: An aspiring artist is faced with a dilemma when he is forced to choose between a normal family life with his girlfriend and her son, or a hedonistic whirl of sex, drugs and rock 'n' roll with a risk-taking friend. Drama, starring Alec Newman, Marc Warren, Sienna Guillory and Lara Clifton
