Documentary following the work of Lincolnshire's Roads Policing Unit

programme.title: Sinkholes: Buried Underground
programme.desc: As the pipes, tunnels and waterways that lie beneath the world's cities start to crumble, sinkholes are appearing with no warning. Footage from instances around the world reveal how once-stable urban areas are sinking right in front of people's eyes

programme.title: The Woman with 40 Cats
programme.desc: Documentary giving an insight into the lives of people whose love of animals has become an obsession. Retired secretary Marlene has 40 cats, which are groomed and bathed every day, while Deb and her family share their home with a brood of chickens. Matt keeps a huge collection of snakes, lizards and other reptiles, and he must also breed thousands of insects and worms to keep the creatures fed

programme.title: Rich Kids Go Skint

Award-winning police drama, guest starring Robert Vaughn (Hustle) alongside Jerry Orbach and Benjamin Bratt

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The murder of a Middle Eastern man sends Briscoe and Curtis racing to thwart a suspected terrorist plot to bring destruction to New York - and leads them to uncover a domestic conspiracy involving horrific female circumcision. Police drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Benjamin Bratt

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A gay city councillor is shot dead after a meeting, and the trail of suspicion leads the team to a bigoted rival politician and a male prostitute. Police drama, starring Sam Waterston and Jerry Orbach

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Tensions are high between new partners Briscoe and Curtis as they investigate the murder of a wealthy student in a biker bar. The detectives discover the victim's father had offered him $10,000 to drop his hobby and his biker girlfriend. Jerry Orbach and Benjamin Bratt star

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The murder of an undercover narcotics agent during a drugs raid splits Kincaid and McCoy over whether or not to ask for the newly reinstated death penalty. Ultimately, District Attorney Schiff must make the call. Crime drama, starring Sam Waterston and Jill Hennessy

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team investigates when a mysterious, fast-spreading illness strikes children from military families. While Gibbs tries to determine the cause, Abby and Jimmy partner with the Naval Medical Research Centre in the hope of delivering a cure before the holidays. Mark Harmon stars

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A petty officer is killed by a stolen surveillance drone and the team links it to elusive terrorist Benham Parsa. NCIS joins forces with the Department of Defence to track down the device before it is used for a large-scale attack, but Gibbs is less than pleased that he has to work with his ex-lover Hollis Mann. Meanwhile, McGee hopes he will be granted time off to attend a black-tie gala honouring his girlfriend Delilah. Guest starring Susanna Thompson (Arrow)

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.desc: A captain on board a yacht is shot dead, and a waiter is found with his throat cut. The crimes are thought to have been committed in waters that are known to be smuggling territory, and when it emerges the vessel belongs to Garcia, the head of a drugs cartel, the coastguard calls the NCIS team to investigate. However, when Pride begins his inquiries, he realises a parallel case run by the FBI could complicate matters, as could an encounter with an old friend - who is now engaged to Garcia

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.desc: Pride decides to act without the FBI's knowledge to deal with drug baron Garcia, and as he takes matters into his own hands, his NCIS comrades volunteer to help - without knowing the full consequences of their involvement. Sebastian goes undercover to bring down the cartel leader, while Patton must employ his old gambling tricks to set Pride's dangerous plan in motion

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.desc: Pride travels to a deep-sea oil rig to investigate a murder, but his life is placed in peril when the team discovers a gas leak on-site is on the verge of causing a catastrophic explosion. With their boss trapped on board the facility, the agents work to save him while he continues to pursue the killer. Meanwhile, Gregorio begins her first day as an official member of the NCIS team

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A woman who claims she has been raped turns to the Unit for help, but the team cannot get enough evidence against the prime suspect and is forced to drop the case. However, another victim comes forward six months later with a similar story, making them believe they have made a terrible mistake. Hard-hitting drama, starring Christopher Meloni, Mariska Hargitay and Dann Florek

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Stabler and Benson get mixed up in the murky world of politics after a coalition leader's gay son is found murdered on the roof of his apartment. The finger of suspicion points to a notorious rapist, who has just been released from prison on parole, but he insists he didn't commit the crime - so further DNA tests are used to shed light on the death. Hard-hitting drama, starring Christopher Meloni, Mariska Hargitay and Dann Florek

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A socialite's body is found in Central Park, and detectives Benson and Stabler initially suspect her wealthy boyfriend of murder. However, the investigation reveals the victim has been living a double life, posing as a homeless teenager - and the team discovers a street family loyal to its sinister leader. Starring Christopher Meloni and Mariska Hargitay

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Benson and Lake team up with FBI agent Lauren Cooper to track down a serial killer who has claimed the lives of more than 20 women - but discover that he too has been murdered. The investigation leads them to a warehouse where they find a hidden torture chamber containing a surviving victim - but she later dies, shutting down a vital line of inquiry and complicating the case still further

programme.desc: An investigation into three murders in the offices of a magazine places the detectives in the middle of a fierce family feud, involving a protective matriarch, warring siblings and a corrupt judge. Award-winning police drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Benjamin Bratt

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The detectives respond to a hold-up committed by a bloodthirsty team of robbers in ski-masks, and McCoy struggles to determine whether the teenage tearaway found with the criminals was an unwilling hostage or a active participant in the crimes

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Curtis try to solve the murder of a college student whose death was depicted in graphic detail on the internet. However, the investigation grinds to a halt when they encounter a lawyer who is unwilling to reveal vital information about her client's past

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: In an effort to find the terrorist Parsa, Gibbs and the NCIS team track down one of his cohorts using evidence gleaned from the drone attack which has killed six people and wounded a further 22. Meanwhile, an emotionally shaken McGee struggles with the ramifications of the incident. Drama, starring Mark Harmon, Sean Murray, David McCallum and Pauley Perrette

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The murder of a port authority officer reveals Parsa's possible whereabouts as the team continues the hunt for the terrorist intent on wiping out NCIS. Bishop reveals her past association with the quarry and suggests where she thinks he may be found, but the CIA has intercepted a call that places Parsa in a different location to Ellie's hunch. Mark Harmon and Emily Wickersham star

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.desc: The team is called into action when thousands of classified government files are stolen by an underground hacker collective. Pride is shocked to discover the group is led by Elvis Bertrand, one of his old contacts, and faces a conflict of interests due to the fact that Bertrand and his allies are known for exposing corruption among the great and the good of New Orleans high society

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.desc: At the request of Gibbs, agents McGee and Torres travel to New Orleans to assist Pride and his team in a case involving a terror playbook. Scott Bakula stars

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: When a woman is found dead in her apartment, her son, recently paroled after serving 15 years for murder, becomes the prime suspect. Goren and Eames meet the detective who investigated the earlier case and discover the man may have been wrongly convicted - revealing a complex cover-up that implicates the policeman himself. Crime drama, starring Vincent D'Onofrio and Kathryn Erbe

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The detectives investigate the murder of a promiscuous millionaire, and soon discover he had a tangled private life, involving a string of lovers and an angry wife. A team of scheming, sultry Russian gold-diggers could hold essential clues to the killing. Hard-hitting drama, starring Christopher Meloni, Mariska Hargitay and Dann Florek

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A prominent judge who was famed for his support of women's rights is found dead in his car, and the ensuing murder investigation leads the detectives to discover he was not as squeaky clean as he had seemed - and was linked to a case of corruption on the parole board. Hard-hitting drama, starring Christopher Meloni, Mariska Hargitay and Dann Florek

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A number of fertilised embryos are stolen from a sperm bank and the team's investigation reveals several unhappy customers - as well as a couple of outspoken anti-fertility activists who liken such clinics to death camps. programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: Quark tries to enhance his reputation by claiming he killed a Klingon in his bar - until the supposed victim's widow turns up demanding he marry her instead. Sci-fi spin-off, starring Armin Shimerman

programme.title: Ghost Whisperer
programme.desc: Melinda learns that her son is haunted by a woman who died while giving birth on the day he was born, and the ghost is convinced the spirit of her dead child has entered the five-year-old's body. Paranormal drama, starring Jennifer Love Hewitt

programme.title: Merlin
programme.desc: The Great Dragon is finally free, and attacks Camelot. With the castle crumbling, the knights cannot hold out much longer - only a Dragonlord can kill such a beast and Uther wiped them all out years ago, or so it is believed. Gaius reveals one such man may still be alive and in hiding, so Arthur and Merlin set out in search of him, before the kingdom is destroyed. But even if they find him, can they persuade him to help his old enemy Uther? Colin Morgan, Bradley James, Richard Wilson and Anthony Head star, with a guest appearance by John Lynch

programme.title: Brits Behind Bars
programme.desc: With thousands of UK citizens currently held in jails around the world, this documentary focuses on the moving cases of British prisoners. Those who break the law overseas face potentially lethal consequences - nightmare 'living hell' conditions, disease, abuse, terror, and sometimes even death. Meeting families and lawyers forging major battles to get fair treatment for their loved ones, the programme reveals trials that have gone catastrophically wrong, dubious evidence, and one man who has been struggling to prove his innocence for almost three decades

programme.title: Double Murder
programme.desc: The story of how, in June 2005, police made the grim discovery of two Polish brothers who had been murdered by extreme blunt force trauma, and the investigation that ensued

programme.title: The Force: North East
programme.desc: There is a tense stand-off as officers try to talk down a man brandishing a samurai sword, while the cells fill up during a busy Saturday night in Newcastle

programme.title: Road Wars

programme.desc: The story of civilian lorry driver Thomas Hamill, who was taken hostage by insurgents in Iraq, but tried to escape his captors despite the huge risks

programme.title: The Queen's Cavalry
programme.desc: Stories of famous horses from the regiment's past, including Sefton, the mount wounded by an IRA bomb. The newest equine member of the troop, Freddy, is gently handled when he is ridden for the first time. The trainee tank drivers' tests, however, are far more gruelling, as they take the vehicles cross-country while learning to drive for war

programme.title: Britain's Greatest Generation
programme.desc: The extraordinary stories of some of the British men and women who fought or lived through the Second World War, now in their nineties or older. The first episode looks at how national unity was tested in the 1920s and 30s with class conflict, soaring unemployment and widespread civil unrest, but despite these upheavals, those growing up in the inter-war years remember much that was positive about life in Britain at the time. When war broke out in 1939, the men and women of this generation were ready to risk their lives for their country, but the evacuation of the British Army from the beaches of Dunkirk was a wake-up call for those expecting a swift victory

programme.title: St Paul's
programme.desc: Part one. Controversy surrounds the appointment of the first female priest at the famous London cathedral

programme.title: Inside Claridge's
programme.desc: For the first time in its long history, the famously discreet luxury hotel in Mayfair, central London, opens its doors to documentary cameras, with director Jane Treays spending a year behind the scenes following staff and guests. The Melchors from California arrive for their annual two-week stay, rekindling their relationship with personal butler Michael Lynch, while energetic general manager Thomas Kochs travels to New York to drum up new business from leading US travel agents

programme.title: Buttons: A Christmas Tale (2018)
programme.desc: Two orphans have only one wish: to find a home for Christmas. Guardian angels help them discover that miracles can happen

programme.title: The Big Money (1956)
programme.desc: An incompetent thief finally manages to make his family of crooks proud of him by pulling off a major robbery, but finds his ill-gotten gains bring him anything but happiness. Comedy, starring Ian Carmichael, Belinda Lee, Kathleen Harrison and Robert Helpmann

programme.title: London Districts
programme.desc: Short visual tours exploring and revealing Notting Hill for locals and tourists. Narrated by Dewyne Lindsay

programme.title: After You've Gone
programme.desc: Sitcom written by My Family creator Fred Barron, starring Nicholas Lyndhurst of only Only Fools and Horses fame as divorcee Jimmy Venables, whose ex-wife leaves to work as a nurse in Africa. He soon finds his efforts to raise his children - Molly, a girl who thinks she's a woman, and Alex, a boy who dresses like one - hindered by mother-in-law Diana, who takes it on herself to move in to the family home. Also in the cast are Celia Imrie and Dani Harmer

The problem is, all his police files and personal records have gone missing - and the children he supposedly abused do not exist

Seeing a chance to write the story that will make him a success, he persuades her to let him document her life, and a strange connection develops between the two lonely outsiders. Comedy drama, starring Michael Doneger, Lyndsy Fonseca and Bruce Campbell

programme.title: Reaper (2014)
programme.desc: A death row inmate is sent to the electric chair, but the execution goes wrong and transforms him into a deadly supernatural creature that destroys everything in its path. programme.title: Victim (1961)
programme.desc: A secretly gay barrister discovers his lover has been driven to suicide by blackmailers, who have also extorted money from several other men. Risking his reputation and marriage, he hunts down the culprits, fully aware that it could lead to his own exposure as a homosexual, illegal at the time. Drama, starring Dirk Bogarde, Sylvia Syms, Dennis Price and Anthony Nicholls

programme.title: Brief Encounter (1974)
programme.desc: Two married strangers meet by chance in a railway station waiting room, and their paths later cross many times until the pair become friends and their meetings a fixed arrangement. But as their feelings for each other transform from friendship into passion, both come to realise the affair is doomed to fail. Remake of David Lean's 1948 classic, starring Richard Burton and Sophia Loren

programme.desc: Dan Snow embarks on a grime-filled journey through the histories of three of the world's leading modern cities. He spends a night as a medieval muck-raker, and tries on a pair of wooden platform shoes designed to elevate the wearer above the filth that covered the streets

programme.title: The Cube
programme.desc: Mollie King from the Saturdays tackles a series of fiendishly difficult challenges as she tries to win up to £250,000 for her chosen charity. Cheered by on bandmates Una Foden, Frankie Sandford, Rochelle Humes and Vanessa White in the studio, the singer is under intense pressure to hold her nerve and avoid slip-ups inside The Cube. Back in 2012, Mo Farah became the first contestant to walk away with the jackpot - a feat nobody else has managed since. How will Mollie compare to the Olympic gold medallist? Phillip Schofield is on hand to provide words of encouragement

programme.title: The Cube
programme.desc: Former EastEnders bad girl Charlie Brooks (Janine) and retired England rugby union player Ben Cohen (Strictly Come Dancing) tackle a series of fiendishly difficult challenges testing skill, dexterity, reaction, wit and wisdom. Cheered by on friends and family in the studio, they're under intense pressure to hold their nerve and avoid slip-ups inside The Cube as they aim for the £250,000 charity jackpot. Each given nine lives at the start, the contestants can also use 'simplify' and 'trial run' lifelines to make the job a little easier. Phillip Schofield is the host

programme.desc: The game show returns in a midweek slot, with a host of fresh games designed to test contestants' skill, nerve and determination. First up is Derry-Londonderry radiographer Lindsey, who believes that working in the trauma department of Southampton Hospital will help her stay calm under pressure. programme.title: ICC Cricket World Cup
programme.desc: Sri Lanka v India. Action from the final at the Wankhede Stadium in Mumbai, India, where the 10th world champions were crowned. After making it past rivals Pakistan in the semi-finals, pre-tournament favourites India were expected to triumph in their home country and claim their first World Cup since 1983, when they beat West Indies at Lord's. However, Sri Lanka claimed impressive victories over England and New Zealand in the knockout stage to progress to the final, and only suffered one defeat in the group stage

programme.desc: Pittsburgh Steelers v Washington Football Team (Kick-off 10.00pm). Coverage of the week 13 match from Heinz Field. The Steelers enter this contest with the best record in the NFL, a perfect 11-0, and will be favourites to triumph over a Washington outfit that has four wins and seven losses on it's ledger. Despite struggling to register more victories, the Football Team are still in with a chance of winning the NFC East and reaching the end-of-season play-offs, owing to the dearth of quality in their division

programme.title: Live NFL
programme.desc: San Francisco 49ers v Buffalo Bills (Kick-off 1.00am). Coverage of the match between the respective NFC West and AFC East sides, which takes place at Levi's Stadium. The Niners have been without their starting quarterback Jimmy Garoppolo for much of this campaign, which is partly responsible for their 5-6 record and sees them sit at the foot of the division. Meanwhile, the Bills have registered eights wins from their 11 matches, and are looking to win the AFC East for the first time since 1995, but face competition from the Miami Dolphins, who have a weaker strength of schedule following a poor season last year

programme.title: Live NFL
programme.desc: Pittsburgh Steelers v Washington Football Team (Kick-off 10.00pm). Coverage of the week 13 match from Heinz Field. The Steelers enter this contest with the best record in the NFL, a perfect 11-0, and will be favourites to triumph over a Washington outfit that has four wins and seven losses on it's ledger. Despite struggling to register more victories, the Football Team are still in with a chance of winning the NFC East and reaching the end-of-season play-offs, owing to the dearth of quality in their division

programme.title: Live NFL
programme.desc: San Francisco 49ers v Buffalo Bills (Kick-off 1.00am). Coverage of the match between the respective NFC West and AFC East sides, which takes place at Levi's Stadium. The Niners have been without their starting quarterback Jimmy Garoppolo for much of this campaign, which is partly responsible for their 5-6 record and sees them sit at the foot of the division. Meanwhile, the Bills have registered eights wins from their 11 matches, and are looking to win the AFC East for the first time since 1995, but face competition from the Miami Dolphins, who have a weaker strength of schedule following a poor season last year
